evals.prompt: My React project has low test coverage. Can you help me add missing component tests?
evals.expected_output: Runs component_test_map.py to discover gaps, scaffolds missing tests, fills behavior assertions, runs coverage, and enforces the 80% threshold.

evals.prompt: I need to set up a coverage gate so my CI fails if component coverage drops below 80%.
evals.expected_output: Runs check_coverage_threshold.py with --threshold 80, identifies branch/function coverage gaps, and advises on CI integration.

evals.prompt: Some of my components have multiple test files. Can you clean this up and merge them?
evals.expected_output: Discovers duplicate test mappings, merges assertions into one canonical file per component, deletes extra entry points, and verifies no behavior is lost.
